zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde de Château-du-Loir於1055年出生在法國o-阿爾培斯時，她的父親Gervais II de Château-du-Loir de Château-du-Loir25歲，母親Erenburga de Chateau du Loire25歲。她於大約1090年與Élie Ier de la Flèche comte du Maine結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1108年在法國享年53歲，埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特勒 曼斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde de Château-du-Loir was born in 1055, in Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Gervais II de Château-du-Loir de Château-du-Loir, was 25 and her mother, Erenburga de Chateau du Loire, was 25. She married Élie Ier de la Flèche comte du Maine about 1090. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1108, in France, at the age of 53, and was buried in Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde de Château-du-Loir est née en 1055, à Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Gervais II de Château-du-Loir de Château-du-Loir, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Erenburga de Chateau du Loire, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Élie Ier de la Flèche comte du Maine environ 1090. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1108, à France, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde de Château-du-Loir 1055 in Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gervais II de Château-du-Loir de Château-du-Loir 25 und ihre Mutter Erenburga de Chateau du Loire 25. Sie hat um 1090 Élie Ier de la Flèche comte du Maine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1108 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Frankreich und wurde in Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Château-du-Loir è nata il nel 1055 nel Rhône-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Gervais II de Château-du-Loir de Château-du-Loir, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Erenburga de Chateau du Loire, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Élie Ier de la Flèche comte du Maine circa 1090. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1108, nel Francia, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Château-du-Loirが1055年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスで生まれた時，父Gervais II de Château-du-Loir de Château-du-Loirは25歳，母Erenburga de Chateau du Loireは25歳であった。約1090年にÉlie Ier de la Flèche comte du Maineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1108年にフランスで53歳で死去し，フランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーサルスル マンスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Château-du-Loir(이)가 1055년 프랑스 ho니-알프스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gervais II de Château-du-Loir de Château-du-Loir(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Erenburga de Chateau du Loire(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1090년 Élie Ier de la Flèche comte du Maine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1108년 프랑스에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 일 먼스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Château-du-Loir nasceu em 1055, em Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Gervais II de Château-du-Loir de Château-du-Loir, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Erenburga de Chateau du Loire, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Élie Ier de la Flèche comte du Maine aproximadamente 1090. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1108, em França, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde de Château-du-Loir родилась в 1055 г. в местности рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Gervais II de Château-du-Loir de Château-du-Loir было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Erenburga de Chateau du Loire, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Élie Ier de la Flèche comte du Maine около 1090 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1108 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности л манс, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde de Château-du-Loir nació en 1055, en Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Gervais II de Château-du-Loir de Château-du-Loir, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Erenburga de Chateau du Loire, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Élie Ier de la Flèche comte du Maine aproximadamente 1090. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1108, en Francia, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia.
